## queries/validation/chain_integrity.cypher [cypher]
Verify TRANSMITTED_TO paths form valid chains (no cycles, connected)
labels: Narrator
rels: TRANSMITTED_TO
clauses: MATCH, WHERE, RETURN

## queries/validation/collection_coverage.cypher [cypher]
Compare expected vs actual hadith counts per collection
labels: Collection, Hadith
rels: APPEARS_IN
clauses: MATCH, OPTIONAL MATCH, WITH, RETURN

## queries/validation/orphan_narrators.cypher [cypher]
Find narrator nodes with no relationships
labels: Narrator
clauses: MATCH, WHERE, RETURN

## tests/workers/test_runner.py [python]
